name: X-Golf Walpole
about: X-Golf Walpole offers an indoor golf simulator experience with a bar and food menu. It features state-of-the-art simulators with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors for accurate gameplay. The venue provides hourly simulator rentals that accommodate up to 6 people per bay, with pricing varying by day and time. It also hosts winter memberships, leagues, and offers PGA-certified lessons, making it suitable for both casual play and serious practice. The facility hosts corporate events, birthday parties, and features a full bar with food options.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with high accuracy
Accommodates groups of up to 6 people per hour
Full bar and food menu available on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas available
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rental is available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue has a full bar and kitchen with food and drink options available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes about one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. For multiple players, it's recommended to book an additional hour for each player in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Walpole welcomes children of all ages.
